front: What is the function of asparagine-linked glycosylation (N-glycosylation)?
back: Oligosaccharyltransferase (OST) transfers Glc3Man9GlcNAc2 from dolichol-P-P to Asn-X-Ser/Thr sequons in the ER. Glycan processing in ER and Golgi determines protein folding, stability, and cell signaling. Congenital disorders of glycosylation affect multiple organs.
